Operation 'generateaccesstoken' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on authentication method (basic auth), what the request should contain, what the response includes (expiration, token type), and how to use the returned token. Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete OAuth flow and token usage requirements.

data.current_description: Generates an access token for authenticating API requests using developer account credentials.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate OAuth access token for API authentication
data.description_suggestion: Generates an OAuth access token required for authenticating subsequent API requests. Accepts developer credentials (consumer key and secret) via basic authentication. Returns an access token with expiration details and token type. The returned token should be used in the Authorization header as a Bearer token for all authenticated API operations.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on authentication method (basic auth), what the request should contain, what the response includes (expiration, token type), and how to use the returned token. Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete OAuth flow and token usage requirements.

message: Operation 'registerwebhook' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about what inputs are required (endpoint URL, event types), authentication method, and what the response contains. Added details about bearer token authentication, subscription ID in response, and how the webhook will be invoked to improve AI agent understanding of the subscription lifecycle.

data.current_description: Registers a webhook endpoint to receive real-time notifications about inventory and sales events.
data.summary_suggestion: Subscribe webhook endpoint to inventory and sales events
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook endpoint URL to receive real-time event notifications for inventory changes and sales transactions. Requires authentication via bearer token. The request should specify the target endpoint URL and event types to subscribe to. Returns a subscription confirmation with a subscription ID that can be used for future management. The registered endpoint will receive POST requests with event payloads when subscribed events occur.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what inputs are required (endpoint URL, event types), authentication method, and what the response contains. Added details about bearer token authentication, subscription ID in response, and how the webhook will be invoked to improve AI agent understanding of the subscription lifecycle.

message: Operation 'createlisting' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about required inputs (product details, pricing, quantity), authentication requirements, what the response contains (listing ID, status), and the immediate availability of the listing. Added these details to help AI agents understand what data is needed, authentication context, and the resulting state after creation.

data.current_description: Creates a new ticket listing with product details and pricing.
data.summary_suggestion: Create new ticket listing with pricing
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new ticket listing for sale on StubHub. Requires authentication via bearer token. The request must include product details (event information, seat details), pricing information, and inventory quantity. Returns the created listing with a unique listing ID and confirmation of the listing status. The listing becomes immediately available for purchase once created. Requires valid seller account and appropriate permissions.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about required inputs (product details, pricing, quantity), authentication requirements, what the response contains (listing ID, status), and the immediate availability of the listing. Added these details to help AI agents understand what data is needed, authentication context, and the resulting state after creation.
